ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-04-2013 Continued To Jul-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that there have been sixteen hearings on status on close of the Estate since December of 2009, and that there is no appearance by David Fredrickson (Counsel who appeared twice on behalf of Mr. Schlaff but did not file a Substitution of Attorney) or John Schlaff. An Order to Appear will be issued to the John Schlaff to appear on July 9, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date. The Order to Appear will indicate that the Court may suspend Mr. Schlaff's powers as Executor and appoint the Public Administrator for close of the Estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Continued To Jun-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Fredricksen appeared by telephone for John Schlaff.

Mr. Fredricksen stated that the Substitution of Attorney was supposed to have been filed by Mr. Schlaff, that he will get it on file and that they got confirmation from the Controller's Office that they received their claim but that there is no time limit for processing. The Court set a deadline of June 4, 2013 for filing of the Petition for Final Distribution. If said petition is not filed by that date, sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day will be imposed until the petition is filed. The Court also stated that if there are any additional assets, that Mr. Schlaff can continue to collect them as the Executor prior to final discharge. Status on close of the Estate was continued to June 4, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chien.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-08-2013 Continued To Apr-02-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Frederickson appeared by telephone for John Schlaff.

Mr. Frederickson requested a three month continuance stating that all claims have been filed for the unclaimed property and that have located some more unclaimed property. Status on close of the Estate was continued to April 2, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court directed Mr. Frederickson to file a Substitution of Attorney.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Continued To Jan-08-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: David Fredricksen appeared by CourtCall for John Schlaff (Executor).

Counsel reported that he is working on getting Unclaim Property of more than $100,000.00 and that he requested for more time. The status on close of the estate was continued to January 8, 2013 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Fredricksen will appear by phone.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Continued To Oct-02-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Frederickson appeared by telephone for John Schlaff.

Status on filing of the Petition for Final Distribution was continued to October 2, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Frederickson stated that they will file claims for the escheated funds.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Continued To Jun-05-12 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Schlaff in Pro Per.

Mr. Schlaff explained why he was unable to file his report and reported on the current status of adminsitration. He is working with an attorney who knows probate. The Status for Filing a Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account was continued to June 5, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the petition is filed by that date, sanctions of $25.00 per day will be imposed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Brown.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Schlaff in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that the 850 Petition was filed on April 8, 2011 with a hearing date of May 17, 2011 and stated that sanctions are discharged as of today. Status on close of the estate was continued to July 13, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear To Give A Status Report On The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Executor, who is now self-represented, is sanctioned $25.00 a day effective today for failure to file an 850 petition, failure to file a petition for instructions, and/or for failure to file a petition to close the estate. Sanctions will run until any of these petitions are filed.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

The matter was continued to March 9, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the 850 petition. If not filed by that date, sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day against Mr. Schlaff will be imposed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear To Give A Status Report On The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Continued To Feb-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Schlaff in Propria Persona.

Mr. Schlaff stated that the stocks are being researched by Morgan Stanley Smith Barney and that he would file an 850 Petition if he does not hear from them. The matter was continued to February 16, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear To Give A Status Report On The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Continued To Jan-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Schlaff in Propria Persona.

Mr. Schlaff stated that he has made some progress, that there were difficulties in locating the stock due to numerous mergers, that he had been sent to multiple financial instituitons and that he was in communication with someone from Dreyfus. The matter was continued to January 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear To Give A Status Report On The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Continued To Nov-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Schlaff in Propria Persona.

Mr. Schlaff stated that the Inventory and Appraisal has been filed, that he was in the process of preparing a declaratory relief petition with regard to the assets held by J.P. Morgan and that he would file it by the end of the week. The matter was continued to November 3, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the declaratory relief petition and the petition for final distribution.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear To Give A Status Report On The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-21-2010 Continued To Aug-18-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Schlaff in Propria Persona.

Mr. Sclaff stated that he received the appraisal from Mr. Kasolas by fax late Monday and that he has not received the hard copy. In addition, he stated that there was an issue with the financial institution turning over the shares because the Aunt puts them into a trust that was never created and that he would work on what he needs to do to statisfy them in order to turn over said assets. The matter was continued to August 18, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the Inventory and Appraisal.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear To Give A Status Report On The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Continued To Jul-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear To Give A Status Report On The Estate
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Continued To Jun-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Schlaff in Propria Persona.

Mr. Schlaff stated that he gathered everything and that he transferred everything over to Mr. Kasolas (Probate Referee). Sanctions in the amount of $125.00 were discharged. The matter was continued to June 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear To Give A Status Report On The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Continued To May-11-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Schlaff appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

Mr. Schlaff stated that he had hard drive failure, that he was completing the letter to the Referee which is expected to go out tomorrow or the day after, and that he had three appraisals done which he is passing on to the Referee. In addition, he stated that there was one piece of property, that the stocks were valued close to $500,000.00 and that there were about ten to fifteen stocks. The matter was continued to May 11, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the Inventory and Appraisal is not filed within 45 days, sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day will be imposed until the Inventory and Appraisal is filed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear To Give A Status Report On The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-23-2010 Continued To Mar-23-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Schlaff in Propria Persona.

Mr. Schlaff stated that he lost the scanned images of the documents due to his lap top failing and asked for additional time to go through the boxes. The matter was continued to March 23, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of filing of the Inventory and Appraisal.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear To Give A Status Report On The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-15-2009 Continued To Feb-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Schlaff in Propria Persona.

Mr. Schlaff stated that he would be filing a Declaratory Relief Petition within 60 to 90 days, that stocks were held in a trust but that there was no trust instrument and that he was having problems with J.P. Morgan with regard to the municipal stocks. In addition, he stated that he would file the Inventory and Appraisal, that he would list/include all of the assets as probate assets and that he was not selling the property. The matter was continued to February 23, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the Inventory and Appraisal.
